overview: Stiflenought is a W/U tempo strategy that leverages Lurrus of the Dream-Den to repeatedly cast cheap spells and recur threats. Stock Up provides card advantage and graveyard fuel, while Phyrexian Dreadnought serves as a resilient finisher. The deck aims to stabilize early, outvalue opponents through recursion, and close games with unblockable or high-toughness creatures.
win_conditions: Lurrus recursion loops with cheap threats
Stock Up card advantage leading to resource exhaustion

keep_criteria: Hands with Lurrus and cheap spells
Hands with Stock Up and early interaction
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking Lurrus or Stock Up
Hands with no early interaction or lands

early_game: Cast Lurrus to recur key spells
Use Stock Up to draw into answers
late_game: Maintain card advantage with Stock Up loops
Control board state until opponent runs out of resources

key_cards.name: Lurrus of the Dream-Den
key_cards.notes: Cast repeatedly with cheap spells to fuel Stock Up and recur threats

key_cards.name: Stock Up
key_cards.notes: Cast from hand or graveyard to draw cards and discard into Lurrus targets

key_cards.name: Phyrexian Dreadnought
key_cards.notes: Cast when mana is available or recur with Lurrus to close games

sequencing_tips: Cast Stock Up before Lurrus to fill graveyard
Hold up mana for counterspells before committing to Lurrus
Prioritize removing opponent's early threats before setting up Dreadnought

matchups.advice: Prioritize early removal and Lurrus recursion to stabilize
Disrupt key pieces with counterspells and discard
Race with Dreadnought and maintain card advantage
